label: exam

translation_findings.en: C. Shorten Activity E by 1 day
translation_findings.issue: EN choices use 'Task' for C/D options A,B but 'Activity' for option C, then 'activity' lowercase in option D ('No activity needs to be shortened'). Inconsistent translation of '作業' within the same question.
translation_findings.suggested_fix: Standardize to 'Task' across all four choices in this question (Shorten Task E by 1 day / No task needs to be shortened).

narrative: Four past-exam questions on project management. All jp stems and choices faithful; answer indices correct (7-1 イ→1, 7-2 ウ→2, 7-3 イ→1, 7-4 イ→1). Markers correct. One minor EN consistency WARN: '作業' translated as 'Task' (A,B) vs 'Activity' (C,D) within question p283::1. Not release-impacting (meaning preserved).
